description_long: This is a large, weathered wooden barrel reinforced with five wide, black metal hoops spaced evenly along its length. The wood staves are dark brown with visible grain and patches of wear, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The barrel has an octagonal profile at the ends, with the metal bands providing structural integrity and a rugged, industrial look. The surface shows signs of rust and discoloration on the metal, adding to its aged appearance. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings, and the ends are solid, indicating it is currently sealed. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban or industrial settings, such as warehouses, alleys, or storage yards.
description: A large, weathered wooden barrel with black metal hoops and an octagonal end profile, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden staves and five black metal hoops, with visible weathering and discoloration.
description_view_1: End view revealing the octagonal shape of the barrel's end, with wood grain and metal banding visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the continuous metal hoops and aged wood surface.
description_view_3: End view matching view 1, showing the octagonal end and the texture of the wood and metal.
